---
bibliography: "references.bib"
title: "KM"
author: "Kirk MacKinnon"
output:
  html_document: 
    theme: "paper"
    css: style.css
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = FALSE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	cache = TRUE
)
library(rorcid)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(rcrossref)
library(knitr)
```

<br><br>

#  {.tabset .tabset-fade}

## About me

<div class="header-wrap">
<div class="header-left">
<h1>Hi, I’m Kirk.</h1>
</div>
<div class="header-right">
<p>

<a href="mailto:km5767@nyu.edu">km5767@nyu.edu</a><br>
<a href="https://github.com/kirkmackinnon">GitHub</a><br>
<a href="CVTest.pdf">CV</a>

</p>
</div>

</div>
<div class="myin">
Thanks for your interest. I am a molecular and computational biologist focused on understanding gene regulatory networks through integrated genomic approaches, including RNA-seq, DAP-seq, and related datasets.

My training spans end-to-end genomics, from DNA and RNA extraction and sequencing library preparation to high-throughput data analysis and modeling. My work emphasizes developing practical, reproducible approaches to analyzing complex biological data.

I am particularly interested in teaching applied bioinformatics, emphasizing clear biological interpretation alongside computational skills, and contributing to the development of collaborative, student-centered research and teaching programs.
</div>
<br>
<p class="signature">— Kirk</p>

<div class="graph-wrap">
  <object type="image/svg+xml" data="timecourse.svg" class="graph-svg"></object>
</div>

<!-- ![](multiAmps_noAxes.gif){} -->

## Publications

```{r, results = FALSE}

test <- works("0000-0001-9698-3985")
dois <- rorcid::identifiers(test)
fullpubs <- rcrossref::cr_works(dois = dois)
fullpubs <- fullpubs$data
pubsdf <- data.frame(title = fullpubs$title, 
                     author = unlist(sapply(fullpubs$author, function(x) paste(x$given, x$family, collapse = ", "))), 
                     year = fullpubs$issued, 
                     journal = fullpubs$container.title, 
                     doi = paste0("https://doi.org/", fullpubs$doi))
pubsdf$year <- sub("-.*", "", pubsdf$year)
pubsdf$title <- gsub("\n", "", pubsdf$title)
pubsdf$author <- gsub("Kirk J.-M. MacKinnon", "<b> Kirk J.-M. MacKinnon </b>", pubsdf$author)
pubsdf$author <- gsub("Kirk J‐M. MacKinnon", "<b> Kirk J-M. MacKinnon </b>", pubsdf$author)
pubsdf$title <- gsub("Brachypodium distachyon", "<i> Brachypodium distachyon </i>", pubsdf$title)
pubsdf <- arrange(pubsdf, desc(year))
```

```{r, results = "asis"}

pubsdf <- tibble::tribble(

  ~year, ~status, ~journal, ~title, ~authors, ~link,

  

  "Submitted", "Submitted", "Nature Communications",

  "Genome-wide transcription factor binding reveals regulatory logic and evolutionary divergence in grasses",

  "Bahman Khahani, Leo A. Baumgart, Kirk R. Amundson, Ian W. McCahill, Greg A. Gregory, <b>Kirk J.-M. MacKinnon</b>, Xiaocheng Yu, Ritesh Mewalal, Anthony Bortolazzo, Yu Zhang, Madelaine E. Bartlett, John P. Vogel, Ian K. Blaby, Ronan C. O’Malley, Samuel P. Hazen",

  NA,

  

  "Submitted", "Submitted", "Molecular Systems Biology",

  "Combinatorial effects of transcription factors functionally revealed by single cell TARGET-seq",

  "Amélie Emanuel, Jean-Baptiste Carluer, Will E. Hinckley, Baldwin Dumortier, Samantha Frangos, <b>Kirk MacKinnon</b>, Bruno Guillotin, Tim L. Jeffers, Yitao Long, Manpreet Katari, Dennis Shasha, Angelo Pasquino, Matthew D. Brooks, Stéphanie Pateyron, Myriam Boyer-Clavel, Stéphanie Boireau, Wojciech Szponarski, Hatem Rouached, Sandrine Ruffel, André Mas, Gloria Coruzzi, Bastiaan O. Bargmann, Etienne Delannoy",

  NA,

  

  "2024", "Published", "Quantitative Plant Biology",

  "Mechanically induced localisation of SECONDARY WALL INTERACTING bZIP is associated with thigmomorphogenic and secondary cell wall gene expression",

  "Joshua H. Coomey, <b>Kirk J.-M. MacKinnon</b>, Ian W. McCahill, Bahman Khahani, Pubudu P. Handakumbura, Gina M. Trabucco, Jessica Mazzola, Nicole A. Leblanc, Rithany Kheam, Miriam Hernandez-Romero, Kerrie Barry, Lifeng Liu, Ji E. Lee, John P. Vogel, Ronan C. O’Malley, James J. Chambers, Samuel P. Hazen",

  "https://doi.org/10.1017/qpb.2024.5",

  

  "2020", "Published", "New Phytologist",

  "Changes in ambient temperature are the prevailing cue in determining <i>Brachypodium distachyon</i> diurnal gene regulation",

  "<b>Kirk J.-M. MacKinnon</b>, Benjamin J. Cole, Chang Yu, Joshua H. Coomey, Nolan T. Hartwick, Marie-Stanislas Remigereau, Tomás Duffy, Todd P. Michael, Steve A. Kay, Samuel P. Hazen",

  "https://doi.org/10.1111/nph.16507",

  

  "2018", "Published", "The Plant Journal",

  "<i>SECONDARY WALL ASSOCIATED MYB1</i> is a positive regulator of secondary cell wall thickening in <i>Brachypodium distachyon</i> and is not found in the Brassicaceae",

  "Pubudu P. Handakumbura, Kathryn Brow, Ian P. Whitney, Kangmei Zhao, Karen A. Sanguinet, Scott J. Lee, Jennifer Olins, Sandra P. Romero-Gamboa, Michael J. Harrington, Carlisle J. Bascom, <b>Kirk J.-M. MacKinnon</b>, Michael T. Veling, Lifeng Liu, Ji E. Lee, John P. Vogel, Ronan C. O’Malley, Magdalena Bezanilla, Laura E. Bartley, Samuel P. Hazen",

  "https://doi.org/10.1111/tpj.14047",

  

  "2018", "Published", "Frontiers in Plant Science",

  "Secondary Wall Regulating NACs Differentially Bind at the Promoter at a CELLULOSE SYNTHASE A4 Cis-eQTL",

  "Jennifer R. Olins, Li Lin, Scott J. Lee, Gina M. Trabucco, <b>Kirk J.-M. MacKinnon</b>, Samuel P. Hazen",

  "https://doi.org/10.3389/fpls.2018.01895",

  

  "2014", "Published", "PLoS ONE",

  "Daily Changes in Temperature, Not the Circadian Clock, Regulate Growth Rate in <i>Brachypodium distachyon</i>",

  "Dominick A. Matos, Benjamin J. Cole, Ian P. Whitney, <b>Kirk J.-M. MacKinnon</b>, Steve A. Kay, Samuel P. Hazen",

  "https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0100072"

)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(pubsdf))) {

  cat(

    "<div class='pub-entry'>",

    "<div class='pub-meta'><b>", pubsdf$year[i], "</b> · ", pubsdf$journal[i], "</div>",

    "<div class='pub-title'><b>", pubsdf$title[i], "</b></div>",

    "<div class='pub-authors'>", pubsdf$authors[i], "</div>"

  )

  

  if (!is.na(pubsdf$link[i])) {

    cat("<div class='pub-link'><a href='", pubsdf$link[i], "' target='_blank'>", pubsdf$link[i], "</a></div>")

  }

  

  cat("</div><hr>\n\n")

}



```


<div class="graph-wrap">
  <object type="image/svg+xml" data="pubtimecourse.svg" class="graph-svg"></object>
</div>


## Applications

<br>

```{r applications, results = "asis", echo = FALSE}

apps <- tibble::tribble(

  ~name, ~desc, ~url, ~image,

  "Timecourse RNA-seq",

  "Interactive exploration of time-course RNA-seq expression patterns.",

  "https://hazenlab.shinyapps.io/shinyapp/",

  "tcthumbnail.png",

  

  "Touch Responsive Timecourse RNA-seq",

  "Visualization of gene expression responses following touch/mechanical stimulation.",

  "https://hazenlab.shinyapps.io/swiztc/",

  "swiztcthumbnail.png",

  

  "Gain and Loss of Function RNA-seq",

  "Exploration of RNA-seq datasets from gain- and loss-of-function transcriptional regulators.",

  "https://hazenlab.shinyapps.io/snd2r/",

  "snd2rthumbnail.png"

)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(apps))) {

  cat(

    "<div class='app-card'>",

      "<div class='app-image'>",

        "<a href='", apps$url[i], "' target='_blank'>",

          "<img src='", apps$image[i], "' alt='", apps$name[i], "'>",

        "</a>",

      "</div>",

      "<div class='app-text'>",

        "<h3>", apps$name[i], "</h3>",

        "<p>", apps$desc[i], "</p>",

        "<a class='app-link' href='", apps$url[i], "' target='_blank'>Open application</a>",

      "</div>",

    "</div>"

  )

}
```



<div class="graph-wrap">
  <object type="image/svg+xml" data="applications-offset.svg" class="graph-svg"></object>
</div>


## CV

[Download CV (PDF)](CVTest.pdf)

![](CVTest.pdf){width="100%" height="1000"}

<div class="graph-wrap">
  <object type="image/svg+xml" data="cv-period.svg" class="graph-svg"></object>
</div>
